name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-48
title: Most rabbit-cage scripts lack --help / usage handling
description: Many hook and script files exit 0 silently when called with --help (no usage shown): hooks/scope-guard.py (treats --help as a tool payload, reads empty stdin and exits 0), hooks/sync-check.py, hooks/session-init.py, hooks/refresh.py, scripts/scope-guard-on.py (the latter ignores all argv entirely), scripts/rabbit-project-set-path.py, scripts/rabbit-project-map.py, scripts/rabbit-project-consolidate.py, scripts/generate-claude-md-header.py, scripts/build.py, scripts/build-targets.py. Spec says these implement stdin/stdout/exit-code contracts but no --help means humans cannot discover the contract without reading source. Add minimal '--help' handler to each public script.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
